lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_li: <sleepy>No animals. Guess I'll just... not work then.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_ho: <sleepy>Hook would be nice. Or, y'know, whatever.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_ba: <sleepy>Basin, basin... I'll just wait for one to show up.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.village_life.butcher_: <sleepy>The butcher works harder than me. Most people do.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.village_life.smokehou: <sleepy>Smokehouse does all the cooking for me. Love that about it.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaughte: <sleepy>Slaughterhouse work is too much effort. Glad I'm not doing it.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.first.settling/2: <sleepy>*yawns*</sleepy> Welcome, I guess. You gonna be our new neighbor or somethin'?
lazy.dialogue.first.spent_night.failed/1: <sleepy>Uh, inn?</sleepy> Yeah, we're not exactly skilled in that department. Like, building stuff? Too much effort, man.
lazy.dialogue.hug.success/2: Thanks for the hug, I guess. <happy>It kinda made my day a little less boring.</happy>
lazy.dialogue.hug.success/6: Ugh, you're like a walking heater. <happy>Not bad, I guess.</happy>
lazy.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <angry>Gross! Don't touch me!</angry> Your germs are just too much to handle!
lazy.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <happy>I wish this moment could, like, never end or something.</happy>
lazy.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <nervous>Ugh, I guess I kinda sorta have feelings for you or whatever.</nervous>
lazy.dialogue.kiss.fail/3: Ugh, <angry>Ash's kisses put yours to shame.</angry>
lazy.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <angry>Get off me,</angry> I can't be bothered right now.
lazy.dialogue.chat.success/1: <sleepy>Ugh, cookies and milk?</sleepy> I could, like, totally go for that right now, but it sounds like way too much effort.
lazy.dialogue.chat.success/5: Building my own village sounds cool and all, but let's face it, <sleepy>I'm way too lazy to actually do it.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>Ah, the good old days of my childhood.</happy> You know, back when I didn't have to lift a finger. Those were the days.
lazy.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <angry>Don't talk to me or I will call the guards to move you away from me.</angry> Lazy people like me need our personal space, you know?
lazy.dialogue.chat.fail/20: <sleepy>I think I'll doze off now, wake me up when you're done rambling.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.story.success/8: Oh wow, so that's how you stumbled upon your first diamond? How fascinating. <sleepy>Yawn.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*snoring loudly* Huh? Did you say something?</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Yawn! This conversation is putting me to sleep.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <sleepy>Ugh, quit it! Can't you see I'm trying to nap here?</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: Seriously? That's your best attempt? <sad>How sad.</sad>
lazy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/5: Is that what you consider humor? <sleepy>Yawn.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.morning/3: <sleepy>Ugh, I'm so tired.</sleepy> You too, huh?
lazy.dialogue.main.morning/6: Wakey wakey, pal. <sleepy>We've got a loooong day ahead of us.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.morning/8: Morning, Mr. Sleepyhead. <sleepy>Don't tell me you're still half-asleep.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I'm thinking of taking it easy today. My body's just not feeling it, you know?</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.morning/11: My schedule is packed to the brim today. <sleepy>Just thinking about it makes me want to crawl back into bed.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.evening/3: <sleepy>Another day, another burden of work. Sigh.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.evening/6: <sad>Today was a complete waste. I accomplished nothing. Absolutely nothing.</sad>
lazy.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>I desperately need a nap. The morning sucked the life out of me.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>You won't catch me roaming around at night. Last time I did, a creeper scared the life out of me.</scared> Not worth it.
lazy.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>Ugh, you're still awake?</sleepy> Don't you have anything better to do?
lazy.dialogue.main.night/6: <happy>Ah, darkness. So serene, so peaceful.</happy> <sleepy>It's the perfect time to kick back and relax, you know?</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>Man, I'm wiped. Today has been exhausting. I might just take it extra easy tomorrow, you feel me?</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>I seriously can't wait to dive into my cozy bed.</sleepy> <happy>It's like a little slice of paradise.</happy>
lazy.dialogue.main.night/5: The guards do their thing, but honestly, <scared>the night still gives me the creeps.</scared> It's like a horror movie out there, don't you think?
lazy.dialogue.location.igloo/1: Ugh, stumbled upon an igloo at %2$s. <frozen>Seriously, who in their right mind would build a house out of snow? It's freezing!</frozen>
lazy.dialogue.location.igloo/2: So, guess what? I happened to come across this abandoned igloo at %2$s. And let me tell you, it looks like nobody has stepped foot in there for ages. <scared>I bet it's infested with ghosts or something.</scared> Gives me the creeps just thinking about it.
lazy.dialogue.location.igloo/3: Oh, boy, you won't believe what I found at %2$s. An old, forsaken ice house they call an igloo. <frozen>It's been deserted for ages, I tell ya. Can't blame anyone for not wanting to live in that freezing hole.</frozen>
lazy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: Eh, so like, <mysterious>I guess there were these strange sounds or whatever coming from down below at %2$s.</mysterious> Like, totally weird, man.
lazy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <mysterious>Dude, I've got this feeling that there's some crazy hidden stuff way deep in the ground at %2$s.</mysterious> Like, for real.
lazy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/3: You won't believe this, but <mysterious>there's this like, ancient city or something at %2$s.</mysterious> I mean, I didn't actually see it, but like, maybe it's all hidden underground or whatever.
lazy.dialogue.location.mansion/1: Ugh, if you drag yourself to %2$s, you might stumble upon a stupid mansion. <scared>It's infested with those illagers, like, ew. Seriously, stay away from that cursed dump if you know what's good for you.</scared>
lazy.dialogue.location.swamp_hut/1: You might want to stay away from that swamp over there at %2$s. <mysterious>It's got this wicked witch's hut,</mysterious> and <scared>let me tell you, it's nothing but trouble.</scared>
lazy.dialogue.location.swamp_hut/2: Hey, just a friendly tip, but you should steer clear of %2$s. <mysterious>There's this creepy witch who lives in a hut around those parts,</mysterious> and believe me, <scared>you don't want to get tangled up in that mess.</scared>
lazy.dialogue.location.village_snowy/1: Oh man, there's this other village over at %2$s. <frozen>It's like, freezing cold all the time. Brrr!</frozen>
lazy.dialogue.location.village_snowy/2: Yo, check it out, there's this village at %2$s in the snowy plains. The people are chill and all, but <frozen>dang, it's like an icebox over there! Can't handle that cold!</frozen>
lazy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <frozen>Ugh, it's so cold here.</frozen> <sleepy>I wish someone would bring me a blanket and a hot drink.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/2: <frozen>Can you believe how freezing it is? I can't feel my fingers anymore.</frozen> <happy>Good thing I stocked up on hot chocolate!</happy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/3: <sleepy>This weather is perfect for doing absolutely nothing. I'm just gonna curl up in bed and binge-watch my favorite shows.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/4: <frozen>Snow?</frozen> <sleepy>Ugh, reminds me of the good old days when I actually had energy to go outside and play. Now I just want to hibernate.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.desert/1: <burning>Ugh, this scorching desert!</burning> But hey, at least we never have to deal with freezing winters like those poor souls in other places.
lazy.dialogue.chat.desert/3: <burning>Man, this desert heat!</burning> I'm either tanned or burnt to a crisp, there's no in-between.
lazy.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <burning>Ugh, seriously? This sun is relentless today. Can't catch a break!</burning>
lazy.dialogue.chat.desert/6: <burning>Seriously, this sun is just unbearable today!</burning>
lazy.dialogue.chat.desert/9: <angry>Ouch!</angry> Stepped on a cactus the other day. Gotta watch my every step in this prickly paradise.
lazy.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <burning>Ugh, is it, like, super hot in that place or something?</burning> I can't even deal with heatwaves, let alone the Nether!
lazy.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <scared>Whoa, you must be, like, the bravest soul ever to venture into the Nether.</scared> Me? Oh, no way, I'm way too chicken-hearted for that. Definitely not scared, just...relaxed, you know?
lazy.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>No way! The Wither goes around causing total chaos, I've heard!</excited>
lazy.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>You actually managed to defeat the Wither?! Seriously, that's mind-blowing!</excited>
lazy.dialogue.story.enderdragon.success/: <happy>Wow, you actually managed to bring the dragon egg back? That's pretty cool, I guess.</happy>
lazy.dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <happy>Wow, you managed to manipulate a skeleton into blowing up a creeper? Impressive, I guess.</happy> <sleepy>*yawn*</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/3: <sleepy>Zombies and skeletons were humans? Yawn. Wake me up when you've got something actually interesting to say.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.joke.animal.success/4: <happy>Oh my, that's just plain silly! But you know what? I kind of adore the stupidity of it all.</happy> It's like a guilty pleasure for my lazy soul.
lazy.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Are you even trying to flirt? I've seen chickens with better game!</angry>
lazy.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <angry>Seriously, dude? How dare you even think about it!</angry>
lazy.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Give it another shot, and you'll feel the wrath of my laziness,</angry> <sleepy>which might take a while!</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.paper/1: <sleepy>*Yawn* Paper, I guess. Can we finish this game already? I have a nap schedule to follow.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.plains/4: <sleepy>Ah, lazy evenings like this make me wanna just plop down and gaze at the sky and clouds. Don't really feel like doing anything else, to be honest.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.plains/8: <happy>You ever catch the morning sunrise in the plains? It's, like, totally epic.</happy> <sleepy>You should totally drag yourself out of bed and witness it sometime. But, uh, no pressure or anything.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_cl: <sleepy>No cleaver means no work. Perfect, really.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_sk: <sleepy>No skinning knife? Hide stays on. Less work for me.</sleepy>
lazy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_ha: <sleepy>No hacksaw? Iron golem waits. So do I. Forever.</sleepy>
